title: Compliance and Enforcement - Canada.ca
content:
## Compliance and Enforcement
As part of its regulatory responsibilities, Health Canada is responsible for compliance monitoring and enforcement activities related to health products in order to verify that regulatory requirements are being applied appropriately.

## What information can you find here?
This section contains links to reports and publications related to compliance and enforcement.
- Health product shortages in Canada: Fiscal year 2024 to 2025 in review
- Drug shortages in Canada: Fiscal year 2023 to 2024 in review
- Community Pharmacy Inspection Program Annual Report, Fiscal Year 2019-2020
- Community Pharmacy Inspection Program Annual Report, Fiscal Year 2018-2019
